metadata.title: UK Contractor Management Services | Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: UK contractor management and compliant onboarding. Engage contractors in the UK. IR35 / off-payroll working, PSC and umbrella considerations, HMRC compliance, CIS where relevant. Fast onboarding.

faqs.title: UK Contractor FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about contractor management in the United Kingdom.

items.question: What is IR35 and does it affect our contractors?
items.answer: IR35 (off-payroll working) can make a client or fee-payer responsible for PAYE if a contractor would be deemed an employee for tax purposes. For medium and large clients, the client usually determines status. We help document assessments and structure engagements to reduce risk.

items.question: How fast can we onboard a UK contractor?
items.answer: With complete KYC, contracts, and payment details, onboarding often takes a few business days. IR35 determinations and umbrella or agency chains may add steps.

items.question: Can we convert a contractor to an employee?
items.answer: Yes. If employment is the right model, we can onboard them via UK EOR with PAYE, NI, pension auto-enrolment, and statutory rights.

items.question: Do you support construction industry contractors (CIS)?
items.answer: Where engagements fall under CIS, we help coordinate verification, deductions, and reporting in line with HMRC rules scoped to your operating model.

items.question: What about personal service companies (PSCs)?
items.answer: Many UK contractors operate through their own limited company. Contracts, IR35 status, and payment routes (direct to PSC vs umbrella) should align. We support compliant B2B invoicing and documentation.
